steps.title: Identify the conversion period in the passage
steps.content: The passage dates the forest-to-pasture conversion to the 1960s and 1970s. Evidence of this conversion would be a decline in forest patches during that exact timeframe.

steps.title: Apply the timeframe to the graph data
steps.content:
Choice D shows forest patches declining across all classes from 1960 to 1979—exactly when the conversion occurred.

The other choices either reference years outside the conversion period (A, B show 1986–2000) or display an increase that contradicts forest loss (C).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
